description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Register for the earliest free in-person weekday evening support meeting within 10 miles of your ZIP code.

target_names: Thursday Evening In-Person Parkinson’s Support Meeting

tasks.name: Register for the earliest free in-person weekday evening support meeting within 10 miles of your ZIP code.
tasks.description: Register for the earliest free in-person weekday evening support meeting within 10 miles of your ZIP code.

tasks.instruction: Save the two most recent articles about sleep problems from the last two years to your reading list.

target_names: Managing Sleep Problems in Parkinson’s: Practical Tips
Why Am I So Tired? Understanding Sleep Changes in Parkinson’s

tasks.name: Save the two most recent articles about sleep problems from the last two years to your reading list.
tasks.description: Save the two most recent articles about sleep problems from the last two years to your reading list.

tasks.instruction: Add to your schedule one exercise class and one education workshop on the same day within the next 30 days, where each costs $15 or less, their total cost is $30 or less, and the workshop occurs after the class.

target_names: Living Well with Parkinson’s: Evening Education Workshop

tasks.name: Add to your schedule one exercise class and one education workshop on the same day within the next 30 days, where each costs $15 or less, their total cost is $30 or less, and the workshop occurs after the class.

tasks.instruction: Add the nearest neurologist within 15 miles who is accepting new Parkinson’s patients and has a rating of at least 4.5 stars to your care team list.
tasks.name: Add the nearest neurologist within 15 miles who is accepting new Parkinson’s patients and has a rating of at least 4.5 stars to your care team list.
tasks.description: Add the nearest neurologist within 15 miles who is accepting new Parkinson’s patients and has a rating of at least 4.5 stars to your care team list.

tasks.instruction: Bookmark a support group for people with Parkinson’s that focuses on newly diagnosed adults around age 60+ and meets at least twice per month on weekends.
tasks.name: Bookmark a support group for people with Parkinson’s that focuses on newly diagnosed adults around age 60+ and meets at least twice per month on weekends.
tasks.description: Bookmark a support group for people with Parkinson’s that focuses on newly diagnosed adults around age 60+ and meets at least twice per month on weekends.

tasks.instruction: Set your notification preferences so you receive only text message reminders for exercise and caregiver support events exactly 1 day and 1 hour before each event.
tasks.name: Set your notification preferences so you receive only text message reminders for exercise and caregiver support events exactly 1 day and 1 hour before each event.
tasks.description: Set your notification preferences so you receive only text message reminders for exercise and caregiver support events exactly 1 day and 1 hour before each event.

tasks.instruction: Create a new anonymous discussion topic about medication side effects in the medications forum category and post your question there.

target_names: Question about tremor worsening after new medication

expected_values.title: Question about tremor worsening after new medication
expected_values.body: I recently started a new medication and noticed my tremor has gotten worse in the evenings. Has anyone experienced increased tremor after changing medications, and how did you talk to your doctor about it?

tasks.name: Create a new anonymous discussion topic about medication side effects in the medications forum category and post your question there.
tasks.description: Create a new anonymous discussion topic about medication side effects in the medications forum category and post your question there.

tasks.instruction: Create a saved collection for caregivers that includes exactly one short article, one short video, and one short checklist, each 10 minutes or less.

target_names: Caregiver Guide: Helping with Nighttime Restlessness

tasks.instruction: Use My Planner to schedule two different weekly exercise classes on Monday and Wednesday mornings and one weekly support group on Friday afternoons.

target_names: Friday Afternoon Living Well Support Group
